wins_analysis: No wins today. Zero trades executed as both pending orders were not filled, indicating entry prices were set too far from market action or liquidity was insufficient at those levels.
losses_analysis: No losses today either, but the day was effectively wasted. Only 2 setups were found across all Nifty 50 stocks, both with zone scores below 50/60, and neither triggered. The TATASTEEL SELL contradicted the trending_up regime, and KOTAKBANK BUY had marginal quality (49/60 zone score, 38% AI probability).
regime_impact: The trending_up regime (ADX=25, Nifty +0.5%, VIX=13.1) should have favored demand zone BUY setups, but the scanner failed to identify high-quality opportunities aligned with this regime. Low VIX and steady uptrend suggest breakout-style entries or slightly more aggressive demand zone proximity thresholds could have captured moves.

improvements.action: Do NOT place orders when zone_score < 50/60 AND AI probability < 40%. Set hard minimum: zone_score >= 50 AND AI_prob >= 45% to place any order.
improvements.reason: Both setups today were below quality thresholds (KOTAKBANK 49/60, 38% prob; TATASTEEL 0% prob) and neither filled. Capital was tied up in low-conviction orders.

improvements.action: In trending_up regime, completely exclude SELL setups unless zone_score >= 55/60 AND AI probability >= 60%. Today's TATASTEEL SELL at 0% probability should never have been placed.
improvements.reason: TATASTEEL SELL directly contradicted the uptrend regime and had 0% AI confidence — a clear waste of margin and order capacity.

improvements.action: When fewer than 3 quality setups are found, consider widening the entry zone tolerance by 0.1-0.2% to increase fill probability on the best available BUY setup in an uptrend.
improvements.reason: KOTAKBANK BUY at 381.20 never filled, possibly because price moved away before reaching the exact demand zone. In strong uptrends, price often doesn't revisit deep demand zones.

improvements.action: Add a 'no-trade day' classification: if scan finds <3 setups with zone_score >= 50, declare it a skip day and preserve capital rather than forcing marginal trades.
improvements.reason: Today's 2 sub-threshold setups resulted in zero execution and zero P&L. Formally recognizing low-opportunity days prevents forced trading.

improvements.action: Expand scanner to include breakout/pullback setups in trending_up regime, not just pure supply/demand zones. Stocks making new highs with shallow pullbacks (2-3%) may offer better entries in strong trends.
improvements.reason: With ADX=25 and steady uptrend, many Nifty 50 stocks may be trending without revisiting deep demand zones, causing the scanner to miss valid opportunities.

tomorrow_focus: With VIX at 13.1 and ADX at 25 in uptrend, look for BUY-only setups with zone_score >= 50 and consider slightly aggressive entries (0.1-0.2% above demand zone) to increase fill probability in continuation moves.

symbol_notes.KOTAKBANK: Regime-aligned BUY but marginal quality (49/60). If zone score improves to 50+ tomorrow with tighter price proximity, worth reconsidering.
symbol_notes.TATASTEEL: Avoid SELL setups on this stock while market is trending_up. 0% AI probability is a clear rejection signal — do not revisit unless regime shifts to neutral/down.
